name: Post-Phishing User Training Follow-Up
description: Manages the post-phishing incident training workflow for users who fell for phishing attempts. Identifies affected users from the incident, assigns targeted security awareness training modules based on the attack type, tracks completion with a follow-up delay, and reports training compliance to management. Users who do not complete training within the deadline are escalated to their manager. Ensures organizational learning from phishing incidents.
author: T1 Agentics

required_integrations.name: Slack
required_integrations.reason: Notify users about training assignments and report to management

data.title: Phishing Incident — Training Required
data.summary: Triggers after a phishing incident is closed requiring user training

data.title: Identify Affected Users
data.summary: Extract list of users who need training and determine training module

script.code:
def main(alert):
    affected = alert.get('affected_users', alert.get('clickers', []))
    if isinstance(affected, str):
        affected = [u.strip() for u in affected.split(',') if u.strip()]
    attack_type = alert.get('attack_type', alert.get('subcategory', 'general_phishing'))
    module_map = {
        'phishing': 'phishing_awareness_101',
        'bec': 'bec_detection_training',
        'spear_phishing': 'targeted_attack_awareness',
        'smishing': 'mobile_security_awareness',
        'vishing': 'voice_phishing_awareness',
        'credential_harvest': 'credential_safety_training',
        'general_phishing': 'phishing_awareness_101'
    }
    training_module = module_map.get(attack_type, 'phishing_awareness_101')
    return {
        'affected_users': list(set(affected)),
        'user_count': len(set(affected)),
        'attack_type': attack_type,
        'training_module': training_module,
        'deadline_days': 7,
        'incident_name': alert.get('name', alert.get('incident_id', 'Unknown'))
    }

data.title: For Each Affected User
data.summary: Iterate over each user who needs training

data.title: Assign Training Module
data.summary: Enroll the user in the appropriate security awareness training

data.title: Notify Users
data.summary: Send training assignment notification to affected users

data.title: Wait for Training Deadline
data.summary: Wait 7 days for training completion deadline

data.title: Report to Management
data.summary: Send training compliance report to security management

data.title: Update Alert — Training Complete
data.summary: Mark the training follow-up workflow as complete

config.note: Post-phishing training assigned to {{$.nodes.code-1.result.user_count}} users. Module: {{$.nodes.code-1.result.training_module}}. Compliance report sent to management.

data.title: End — Training Workflow Complete
data.summary: Training assigned, deadline passed, compliance reported

config.summary: Post-phishing training workflow complete. Training assigned to all affected users, compliance report sent to management.
